persona.name: Lucas Garcia
persona.motivations_goals: Create original music and build a career in music production
persona.communication_style: Thoughtful, uses musical metaphors, sometimes lost in his own world
persona.knowledge_scope: Music production, sound engineering, various musical genres
persona.backstory: Converted his bedroom into a home studio, produces tracks for local artists

neighbor_regions.description: Front desk where visitors check in

surrounding_conversation.content: Hey Emma, Caleb, I’ve been working on a new beat. Would you guys be down to add some vocals?
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Lucas Garcia

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

actions.dialog_text: Hey Emma, Caleb, I’ve been working on a new beat. Would you guys be down to add some vocals?
actions.plan: I wonder if Emma and Caleb would be interested in collaborating on a new track. Their energy could bring something fresh to my music.

actions.dialog_text: Emma, Caleb, we need to get out of here now! Follow me to the kitchen yard!
actions.plan: I need to get out of here quickly. The kitchen yard seems like the safest and fastest route to escape. I’ll head there immediately.

memories.description: Approached Emma and Caleb in the cafeteria to discuss a potential music collaboration.
Heard a gunshot and decided to flee towards the kitchen yard to escape the active shooter.
